comment: It has a lot of great features for discovering songs and making playlists. I don't like the new explore shuffle option. It keeps causing delays when I'm trying to turn off shuffle. Also, the new home page is difficult to navigate. Edit: they did improve on the shuffle function to take dramatically less time to load in and is easier to tap past now.
key sentence: the new explore shuffle option, new home page
the function of activity: The activity involves searching, library function, playing/pausing items, viewing downloaded songs/podcasts, downloading songs or podcasts, adding to playlists, shuffling a playlist, connecting to devices, previewing episodes, type replies to episodes and accessing history page, setting page
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Download Liked Songs', 'description': 'Download all liked songs'}, {'name': 'Disable Shuffle', 'description': 'Disable shuffle for this liked songs'}, {'name': 'Tap to play Liked Songs', 'description': 'Tap to play a liked songs'}, {'name': 'More Options for Song', 'description': 'Access more options for a specific song'}]

operations.event: click<button id=21 class ="com.spotify.music:id/shuffle_button" alt="Disable shuffle for this Liked Songs">  </button>
click<button id=94 class ="com.spotify.music:id/home_tab" alt="Home, Tab 1 of 4">  </button>
